description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly concave top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its body, accompanied by white wave graphics. A barcode and nutritional information are visible on one side, while the word 'Coke' is prominently displayed on another. The metallic surface has a glossy finish, typical of aluminum beverage cans, and the top is sealed, lacking a visible pull tab. The can appears clean and undamaged, with no visible dents, rust, or scratches. Its size and proportions are consistent with a standard 12 fl oz soda can commonly found in urban environments.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, barcode, and wave graphics, appearing clean and undamaged. The can is cylindrical and metallic, typical of a standard soda can.
description_view_0: This view shows the barcode, nutritional information, and part of the Coca-Cola logo on a red background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full Coca-Cola script logo and the white wave design, with some label text visible.
description_view_2: This view displays the side of the can with the Coca-Cola script logo and minimal text, focusing on the red and white wave pattern.
description_view_3: This view features the large 'Coke' text in white on a red background, with the wave design curving around the can.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with wave graphics on a red background, easily recognizable as the Coca-Cola brand.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola Trade mark ® COKE 12 FL OZ NEW YORK 11379 NEW YORK CITY CANNED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY ATLANTA, GA 30313 BY COCA-COLA BOTTLING CO. OF NEW YORK, INC. INGREDIENTS: CARBONATED WATER, SUGAR, CARAMEL COLOR, PHOSPHORIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVORS, CAFFEINE.
attribute_barcode: Horizontal black-and-white barcode on the back label.
